name: Surfer Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Pre-heat oven to 350 degrees.
2. In a large saucepan, melt butterscotch pieces, sugar and butter over medium heat, stirring constantly.
3. Remove from heat. Add egg; beat well.
4. Add flour, baking powder and salt. Stir in remaining ingredients.
5. Spread in greased 8-inch pan.
6. Bake at 350 degrees for 20 to 25 minutes.
7. Cool; cut into bars. Makes 24.
